title: HostToContainer
description:
A message sent from the host to an agent container.

Serialized as an internally-tagged JSON object with a `type`
discriminator. See [`docs/IPC_PROTOCOL.md`](../../../../docs/IPC_PROTOCOL.md)
§Host → Container for the wire format.

oneOf.description: `init` — initial context and configuration for a job.
`messages` — follow-up messages for an in-flight job.

GroupCapabilities.description:
Capabilities granted to a group, determining which command
families are available beyond the base scoped set.

tanren.description: Whether this group may dispatch Tanren jobs.

GroupInfo.description: Summary of the group the agent is serving for this job.

capabilities.description:
Capabilities granted to this group. Determines which command
families the IPC layer will accept from sessions bound to
this group.

is_main.description: Whether this group is the `main` group with elevated privileges.

HistoricalMessage.description:
A historical chat message included in the `init.context.messages`
array or the `messages` follow-up envelope.

sender.description: Display name of the message sender.

timestamp.description:
ISO 8601 timestamp, carried as a string so the crate stays
neutral with respect to timestamp precision and timezone format.

InitConfig.description:
Provider-proxy and adapter configuration carried inside an `init`
message.

max_tokens.description: Maximum output tokens for this job.

model.description: Model identifier to request from the provider.

provider_proxy_token.description: Bearer token the adapter should present to the provider proxy.

provider_proxy_url.description: Base URL the adapter should target for provider calls.

session_id.description: Adapter session identifier to resume (if any).

timeout_seconds.description: Hard timeout (in seconds) for the whole job.

tools_enabled.description: Whether tool use is permitted for this job.

InitContext.description: Context bundle carried inside an `init` message.

group.description: Summary of the group the agent is serving.

messages.description: Historical messages making up the current context window.

timezone.description: IANA timezone name for resolving relative time references.

InitPayload.description: `init` — initial context and configuration for processing a job.

job_id.description: Unique job identifier for correlation with downstream messages.

MessagesPayload.description:
`messages` — follow-up messages that arrived while the container
was processing.

job_id.description: Job identifier this follow-up belongs to.

messages.description: New historical messages to append to the context window.

deadline_ms.description:
Deadline in milliseconds. After this deadline the host will
forcibly terminate the container.

reason.description: Why the host is asking for shutdown.

ShutdownReason.description:
Why the host is asking the container to shut down.

Closed enum on the wire — a value not in this list is a protocol
error.

oneOf.description: The container was idle beyond its configured idle TTL.
The host itself is shutting down.
The warm pool evicted this container.
A failed job triggered a recover-by-restart path.
